key_insight: The paper introduces Relaxed Natural Formal Language as an intermediate, more human-like target for auto-formalization, then systematically elaborates it into verifiable Core NFL proofs.
engineering_relevance: This reduces the language gap between informal mathematics and theorem provers, making automated proof generation more practical, inspectable, and easier to verify.
method: Translate informal math into Relaxed NFL with partial expressions and statements allowed
Elaborate Relaxed NFL into Core NFL using rule-based transforms plus LLM-generated heuristics
Generate proof gaps from Core NFL and discharge them with LLM-written tactic scripts and solver calls
evidence_signal: The abstract describes a verifiable pipeline with explicit constraints on each transformation stage, but does not report quantitative results or benchmark numbers.
watch_item: The approach still depends on heuristic LLM-generated elaboration and tactic scripts, so reliability may hinge on how well the system controls ambiguity and transformation errors.
paper_title: Verifiable Auto-Formalization of Mathematics Using a Relaxed Natural Formal Language
